caption: An older man with gray hair and glasses speaks into a black microphone. He wears a light-colored, patterned button-down shirt and a beaded necklace. The setting is an indoor space with a backdrop of horizontal wooden blinds. The text "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right of the frame. Across the sequence, the man's facial expression shifts slightly as he speaks; he begins with his mouth open, closes it briefly, and then opens it again to continue talking. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium close-up shot of the man from the chest up throughout the clip.
